disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe colicky lower abdominal pain with repeated vomiting tonight and no flatus or stool passed since yesterday, with a swollen tight abdomen
trigger_question_examples: When did you last pass gas or open your bowels?
Are you able to keep anything down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The cramps are severe and keep coming in waves, I've been sick four times, and I haven't passed any wind or been to the toilet since yesterday. My belly feels swollen and tight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Four-month progressive change in bowel habit — alternating constipation and new loose motions
trigger_question_examples: Has your bowel habit changed at all recently?
Has this been building up over time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about four months my bowels have been all over the place — really constipated, then bouts of loose motions. It's not been right for a while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Intermittent dark, tar-like stool over the past month
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any blood, or dark or black stools?
What has the colour of your motions been like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you ask — on and off over the last month my poo has looked dark and tar-like.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 6 kg over recent months with loss of appetite
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've dropped about 6 kilos without trying and I've really gone off my food.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Signs the patient can self-report suggesting dehydration — dry mouth and lightheadedness on sitting up
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded?
Is your mouth dry, and are you passing much urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My mouth is really dry and I go lightheaded when I sit up. I've been too sick to drink much.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent opioid use or new constipating medication
trigger_question_examples: Have you started any new medicines or strong painkillers recently?
Are you taking anything that tends to cause constipation?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't started anything new and I've not taken any strong painkillers that bung you up.
